title: crotalaria tamboensis
intro: Crotalaria tamboensis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae), native to Peru. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria tamboensis include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. Crotalaria tamboensis is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from minor skin conditions to more serious infections.
